title = "Configuration Reference"
description = "Complete configuration file reference"

template = "docs.html"
+++

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `cargo xtask gen-docs` ‚Äî do not edit manually -->

Anodizer uses `.anodizer.yaml` (or `.anodizer.toml`) in your project root.

## Top-Level Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `after` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî | Hooks run after the release pipeline completes. |
| `announce` | AnnounceConfig | ‚Äî | Announcement configuration (Slack, Discord, email, etc.). |
| `artifactories` | list of ArtifactoryConfig | ‚Äî | Artifactory upload configurations. |
| `aur_sources` | list of AurSourceConfig | ‚Äî | AUR source package publishing configurations (source-only PKGBUILD, not -bin). |
| `before` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî | Hooks run before the release pipeline starts. |
| `binary_signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` | Binary-specific signing configs (same shape as `signs` but only for binary artifacts). The `artifacts` field on each entry is constrained at parse time to `binary` / `none` (or omitted) ‚Äî a broader filter on `binary_signs` would silently match nothing because the loop only iterates Binary artifacts. Constraint lives in `deserialize_binary_signs`. |
| `changelog` | ChangelogConfig | ‚Äî | Changelog generation configuration. |
| `cloudsmiths` | list of CloudSmithConfig | ‚Äî | CloudSmith publisher configurations. |
| `crates` | list of CrateConfig | `[]` | List of crates in this project. |
| `defaults` | Defaults | ‚Äî | Default values applied to all crates unless overridden. |
| `dist` | string | `./dist` | Output directory for build artifacts (default: ./dist). |
| `docker_signs` | list of DockerSignConfig | ‚Äî | Docker image signing configurations. |
| `dockerhub` | list of DockerHubConfig | ‚Äî | DockerHub description sync configurations. |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables available to all template expressions.

List of `KEY=VALUE` strings (matches GoReleaser): `env: ["MY_VAR=hello", "DEPLOY_ENV=staging"]`. Order is preserved so chained env applications (sign + sbom + notarize) see entries in declared order. Values are rendered through the template engine before being set, so expressions like `{{ .Tag }}` or `{{ .Date }}` are expanded. |
| `env_files` | EnvFilesConfig | ‚Äî | Environment file configuration. Accepts either: - A list of `.env` file paths: `[".env", ".release.env"]` - A struct with token file paths: `{ github_token: "~/.config/goreleaser/github_token" }` |
| `force_token` | ForceTokenKind | ‚Äî | Force a specific token type for authentication. When set, overrides automatic token detection from environment variables. |
| `git` | GitConfig | ‚Äî | Git-level tag discovery and sorting settings. |
| `gitea_urls` | GiteaUrlsConfig | ‚Äî | Custom Gitea API/download URLs for self-hosted Gitea installations. |
| `github_urls` | GitHubUrlsConfig | ‚Äî | Custom GitHub API/upload/download URLs for GitHub Enterprise installations. |
| `gitlab_urls` | GitLabUrlsConfig | ‚Äî | Custom GitLab API/download URLs for self-hosted GitLab installations. |
| `homebrew_casks` | list of HomebrewCaskConfig | ‚Äî | Top-level Homebrew Cask configurations. `homebrew_casks` is a top-level array with its own repository, commit_author, directory, skip_upload, hooks, dependencies, conflicts, completions, manpages, structured uninstall/zap, etc. |
| `includes` | list of IncludeSpec | ‚Äî | Additional config files to merge into this config. Supports plain string paths, `from_file:` for structured file paths, and `from_url:` for fetching configs from URLs with optional headers. |
| `makeselfs` | list of MakeselfConfig | `[]` | Makeself self-extracting archive configurations. |
| `metadata` | MetadataConfig | ‚Äî | Project metadata configuration (applied to metadata.json output files). |
| `milestones` | list of MilestoneConfig | ‚Äî | Milestone closing configurations. |
| `monorepo` | MonorepoConfig | ‚Äî | GoReleaser Pro monorepo configuration. When configured, tag discovery filters by tag_prefix and the working directory is scoped to dir. |
| `nightly` | NightlyConfig | ‚Äî | Nightly release configuration. |
| `notarize` | NotarizeConfig | ‚Äî | macOS code signing and notarization configuration. |
| `partial` | PartialConfig | ‚Äî | Partial/split build configuration for fan-out CI pipelines. |
| `project_name` | string | ‚Äî | Human-readable project name used in templates and release titles. |
| `publishers` | list of PublisherConfig | ‚Äî | Generic artifact publisher configurations. |
| `release` | ReleaseConfig | ‚Äî | GitHub release configuration shared by all crates. |
| `report_sizes` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, log artifact file sizes after building. |
| `sboms` | list of SbomConfig | `[]` | Software bill of materials (SBOM) generation configurations. |
| `signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` | Signing configurations for binaries, archives, and checksums. |
| `snapshot` | SnapshotConfig | ‚Äî | Snapshot release configuration (local/non-tag builds). |
| `source` | SourceConfig | ‚Äî | Source archive configuration. |
| `srpms` | SrpmConfig | ‚Äî | Source RPM configuration. Renamed from `srpm:` (singular) for spelling parity with `Defaults.srpms` and the rest of the plural-name packaging fields. The `srpm:` spelling is still accepted via serde alias for back-compat. |
| `tag` | TagConfig | ‚Äî | Automatic semantic version tagging configuration. |
| `template_files` | list of TemplateFileConfig | ‚Äî | Template files to render and include as release artifacts. File contents are processed through the template engine. |
| `uploads` | list of UploadConfig | ‚Äî | Generic HTTP upload configurations. |
| `upx` | list of UpxConfig | `[]` | UPX binary compression configurations. |
| `variables` | map | ‚Äî | Custom template variables accessible as {{ .Var.key }} in templates. Provides a way to define reusable values, especially useful with config includes. |
| `version` | integer | ‚Äî | Schema version. Currently supports 1 (implicit default) and 2. |
| `workspaces` | list of WorkspaceConfig | ‚Äî | Independent workspace roots in a monorepo. |

## `after`
Top-level lifecycle hooks for `before` and `after` blocks. Each block has `pre` and `post` lists of hook commands that run around the entire pipeline (not individual stages).
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `hooks` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî | Commands to run before the pipeline or stage starts. Matches GoReleaser `before.hooks` canonically. |
| `post` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî | Commands to run after the pipeline or stage completes. Anodizer extension (GoReleaser has no top-level `after:` block). |

## `announce`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `bluesky` | BlueskyAnnounce | ‚Äî | Bluesky announcement configuration. |
| `discord` | DiscordAnnounce | ‚Äî | Discord announcement configuration. |
| `discourse` | DiscourseAnnounce | ‚Äî | Discourse announcement configuration. |
| `email` | EmailAnnounce | ‚Äî | Email announcement configuration. SCH-34 (WAVE 5.6) ‚Äî accepts the historical `smtp:` key as an alias because GR itself renamed `smtp:` -> `email:` in v1.21+ and kept the alias for migration. Mirroring GR's own alias keeps "use what GR uses today" consistent without forcing a re-yaml of legacy GR configs. |
| `linkedin` | LinkedInAnnounce | ‚Äî | LinkedIn announcement configuration. |
| `mastodon` | MastodonAnnounce | ‚Äî | Mastodon announcement configuration. |
| `mattermost` | MattermostAnnounce | ‚Äî | Mattermost announcement configuration. |
| `opencollective` | OpenCollectiveAnnounce | ‚Äî | OpenCollective announcement configuration. |
| `reddit` | RedditAnnounce | ‚Äî | Reddit announcement configuration. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Template-conditional skip: if rendered to "true", skip the entire announce stage. |
| `slack` | SlackAnnounce | ‚Äî | Slack announcement configuration. |
| `teams` | TeamsAnnounce | ‚Äî | Microsoft Teams announcement configuration. |
| `telegram` | TelegramAnnounce | ‚Äî | Telegram announcement configuration. |
| `twitter` | TwitterAnnounce | ‚Äî | Twitter/X announcement configuration. |
| `webhook` | WebhookConfig | ‚Äî | Generic webhook announcement configuration. |

## `artifactories`
Artifactory upload configuration. Uploads artifacts to JFrog Artifactory repositories.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `checksum` | bool | ‚Äî | Include checksums in uploaded artifacts. |
| `checksum_header` | string | ‚Äî | Header name used for checksum verification (e.g. `X-Checksum-Sha256`). |
| `client_x509_cert` | string | ‚Äî | Path to client X.509 certificate for mTLS authentication. |
| `client_x509_key` | string | ‚Äî | Path to client X.509 private key for mTLS authentication. |
| `custom_artifact_name` | bool | ‚Äî | Use custom artifact naming instead of default. |
| `custom_headers` | map | ‚Äî | Custom HTTP headers sent with each upload request. |
| `extra_files` | list of ExtraFileSpec | ‚Äî | Extra files to upload alongside build artifacts. |
| `extra_files_only` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, upload only extra_files (skip normal artifacts). |
| `exts` | list of string | ‚Äî | File extension filter: only upload artifacts matching these extensions. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only upload artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `meta` | bool | ‚Äî | Include metadata artifacts in uploaded artifacts. |
| `method` | string | ‚Äî | HTTP method to use for uploads (default: "PUT"). |
| `mode` | string | ‚Äî | Upload mode: "archive" (upload archives) or "binary" (upload binaries). |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Human-readable name for this publisher (used in logs). |
| `password` | string | ‚Äî | Artifactory password or API key (or env var reference). |
| `signature` | bool | ‚Äî | Include signatures in uploaded artifacts. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Template-conditional skip: if rendered result is `"true"`, skip this publisher. |
| `target` | string | ‚Äî | Target URL template for uploads (supports template variables). |
| `trusted_certificates` | string | ‚Äî | PEM-encoded trusted CA certificates for TLS verification. Appended to the system certificate pool. |
| `username` | string | ‚Äî | Artifactory username for authentication. |

## `aur_sources`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `amd64_variant` | Amd64Variant | ‚Äî | `x86_64` micro-architecture variant ‚Äî `v1` (baseline), `v2`, `v3` (AVX2), or `v4`. Equivalent to GR `AurSource.Goamd64`. Constrained to a typed enum because AUR source pkgs build from the upstream tarball (no binary artifacts to filter), so the value's only role is as the `Amd64` template var consumed by `prepare:` / `build:` / `package:` script bodies ‚Äî typos must fail at parse time, not silently render an invalid string into the PKGBUILD. When unset, defaults to `v1` at template-render time. |
| `arches` | list of string | ‚Äî | Explicit architecture list (default: auto-detect from artifacts). |
| `backup` | list of string | ‚Äî | Backup files to preserve on upgrade. |
| `build` | string | ‚Äî | Custom `build()` function body for PKGBUILD. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | ‚Äî | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | ‚Äî | Custom commit message template. |
| `conflicts` | list of string | ‚Äî | Packages this PKGBUILD conflicts with. |
| `contributors` | list of string | ‚Äî | Contributors listed in PKGBUILD comments. |
| `depends` | list of string | ‚Äî | Runtime dependencies. |
| `description` | string | ‚Äî | Short description of the package. |
| `directory` | string | ‚Äî | Subdirectory in the git repo for committed files. |
| `git_ssh_command` | string | ‚Äî | Custom SSH command for git operations. |
| `git_url` | string | ‚Äî | AUR SSH git URL. |
| `homepage` | string | ‚Äî | Project homepage URL. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter. |
| `license` | string | ‚Äî | SPDX license identifier. |
| `maintainers` | list of string | ‚Äî | PKGBUILD maintainer entries. |
| `makedepends` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build-time dependencies (source packages need these). |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Override the package name (default: crate name, no -bin suffix). |
| `optdepends` | list of string | ‚Äî | Optional dependencies. |
| `package` | string | ‚Äî | Custom `package()` function body for PKGBUILD. |
| `prepare` | string | ‚Äî | Custom `prepare()` function body for PKGBUILD. |
| `private_key` | string | ‚Äî | Path to SSH private key file. |
| `provides` | list of string | ‚Äî | Packages this PKGBUILD provides. |
| `rel` | string | ‚Äî | Package release number (default: "1"). |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip this config. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip publishing. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prereleases. |
| `url_template` | string | ‚Äî | Custom URL template for download URLs. |

## `before`
Top-level lifecycle hooks for `before` and `after` blocks. Each block has `pre` and `post` lists of hook commands that run around the entire pipeline (not individual stages).
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `hooks` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî | Commands to run before the pipeline or stage starts. Matches GoReleaser `before.hooks` canonically. |
| `post` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî | Commands to run after the pipeline or stage completes. Anodizer extension (GoReleaser has no top-level `after:` block). |

## `binary_signs`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `args` | list of string | ‚Äî | Arguments passed to the signing command (supports templates with ${artifact} and ${signature}). |
| `artifacts` | string | ‚Äî | Artifact types to sign: "all", "archive", "binary", "checksum", "package", "sbom" (default: "none"). |
| `certificate` | string | ‚Äî | Certificate file to embed in the signature (Cosign bundle signing). |
| `cmd` | string | ‚Äî | Signing command to invoke (default: "cosign" or "gpg"). |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables passed to the signing command. |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Unique identifier for this sign config. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only sign artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | ‚Äî | Template-conditional: skip this sign config if rendered result is "false" or empty. |
| `output` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Capture and log stdout/stderr of the signing command. Accepts bool or template string (e.g., "{{ .IsSnapshot }}"). |
| `signature` | string | ‚Äî | Signature output filename template (supports templates). |
| `stdin` | string | ‚Äî | Content written to the signing command's stdin. |
| `stdin_file` | string | ‚Äî | Path to a file whose content is written to the signing command's stdin. |

## `changelog`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `abbrev` | integer | ‚Äî | Hash abbreviation length. Default: 0 (no truncation, emit the full SHA). Set to -1 to omit the hash entirely; positive values truncate to N chars. Mirrors GoReleaser `internal/pipe/changelog/changelog.go`'s `abbrevEntry`. |
| `ai` | ChangelogAiConfig | ‚Äî | AI-powered changelog enhancement configuration. |
| `divider` | string | ‚Äî | Divider string inserted between changelog groups (e.g. `"---"`). Supports templates. |
| `filters` | ChangelogFilters | ‚Äî | Commit message filters to include or exclude from the changelog. |
| `footer` | ContentSource | ‚Äî | Text appended to the changelog. Same shape as `header`. |
| `format` | string | ‚Äî | Template for each changelog commit line. Available variables: SHA (full hash), ShortSHA (abbreviated), Message (commit subject), AuthorName, AuthorEmail, Login (per-commit GitHub username, `github` backend only), Logins (per-entry comma-separated list of GitHub usernames for that commit, `github` backend only), AllLogins (comma-separated list of all GitHub usernames across the entire release, `github` backend only).

Default depends on backend (matches GoReleaser `internal/pipe/changelog/changelog.go:54-61`): - `git`: `"{{ SHA }} {{ Message }}"` - `github`/`gitlab`/`gitea`: `"{{ SHA }}: {{ Message }} (@Login or AuthorName <AuthorEmail>)"`

When `abbrev < 0`, the default reduces to `"{{ Message }}"` (no hash prefix). |
| `groups` | list of ChangelogGroup | ‚Äî | Groups for organizing changelog entries by commit message prefix. |
| `header` | ContentSource | ‚Äî | Text prepended to the changelog. Inline string, `from_file: <path>`, or `from_url: <url>` ‚Äî symmetric with the release block's header/footer so users can compose headers from a templated file or remote endpoint (GoReleaser uses a plain string here; anodizer extends to ContentSource for consistency with `release.header`). |
| `paths` | list of string | ‚Äî | File paths to filter commits by. Only commits touching files under these paths are included. Works with `use: git` for precise per-commit filtering. With `use: github`, only the first path is used for API queries; multi-path filtering is coarse. Supports template rendering. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip changelog generation. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional skip). |
| `snapshot` | bool | ‚Äî | When `true`, render the changelog even in snapshot mode. Anodizer matches GoReleaser's default (skip changelog on `ctx.Snapshot`) and lets users opt back in here for local preview / draft generation. Wired in `crates/stage-changelog/src/lib.rs::ChangelogStage::run`. |
| `sort` | string | ‚Äî | Sort order for changelog entries: "asc" or "desc" (default: "asc"). |
| `title` | string | ‚Äî | Title heading for the changelog. Default: "Changelog". Supports templates. |
| `use` | string | ‚Äî | Changelog source: `"git"` (default), `"github"`, or `"github-native"`. `"github"` fetches commits via the GitHub API, enriching entries with author login information (available as the `{{ Logins }}` per-entry template variable and the `{{ AllLogins }}` release-wide variable). `"github-native"` delegates entirely to GitHub's auto-generated notes. |

## `cloudsmiths`
CloudSmith publisher configuration. Pushes packages to CloudSmith repositories.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `component` | string | ‚Äî | Debian component name (e.g. "main"). |
| `distributions` | map | ‚Äî | Distribution mapping per format (e.g. `deb: "ubuntu/focal"`). |
| `formats` | list of string | ‚Äî | Package format filter: only publish artifacts matching these formats. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only publish artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `organization` | string | ‚Äî | CloudSmith organization slug. |
| `repository` | string | ‚Äî | CloudSmith repository slug. |
| `republish` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | When true, allow republishing over existing package versions. |
| `secret_name` | string | ‚Äî | Environment variable name containing the CloudSmith API key. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Template-conditional skip: if rendered result is `"true"`, skip this publisher. |

## `crates`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `app_bundles` | list of AppBundleConfig | ‚Äî | macOS app bundle configurations for this crate. |
| `archives` | list of ArchiveConfig | `[]` | Archive configurations for this crate. Set to false to disable archiving, or provide an array of archive configs. |
| `binstall` | BinstallConfig | ‚Äî | cargo-binstall metadata configuration for this crate. |
| `blobs` | list of BlobConfig | ‚Äî | Cloud storage (S3/GCS/Azure) upload configurations for this crate. |
| `builds` | list of BuildConfig | ‚Äî | Build configurations for this crate. One entry per binary by default. |
| `checksum` | ChecksumConfig | ‚Äî | Checksum configuration for this crate. |
| `cross` | CrossStrategy | ‚Äî | Cross-compilation strategy for this crate: auto, zigbuild, cross, or cargo. |
| `depends_on` | list of string | ‚Äî | Other crates this crate depends on; ensures release ordering. |
| `dmgs` | list of DmgConfig | ‚Äî | macOS DMG disk image configurations for this crate. |
| `docker_digest` | DockerDigestConfig | ‚Äî | Docker image digest file configuration for this crate. |
| `docker_manifests` | list of DockerManifestConfig | ‚Äî | Docker multi-platform manifest configurations for this crate. |
| `docker_v2` | list of DockerV2Config | ‚Äî | Docker V2 image build configurations for this crate (canonical API: images+tags, annotations, build_args, sbom, disable). The legacy `docker:` block was removed; this is the only docker surface. |
| `flatpaks` | list of FlatpakConfig | ‚Äî | Linux Flatpak bundle configurations for this crate. |
| `msis` | list of MsiConfig | ‚Äî | Windows MSI installer configurations for this crate. |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Crate name as published (must match the Cargo.toml package name). |
| `nfpms` | list of NfpmConfig | ‚Äî | Linux package (deb, rpm, apk) configurations for this crate. Renamed from `nfpm:` (singular) for spelling parity with `Defaults.nfpms` and the rest of the plural-name per-crate packaging lists (`dmgs`, `msis`, `pkgs`, `nsis`, ...). The `nfpm:` spelling is still accepted via serde alias for back-compat. |
| `no_unique_dist_dir` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | When true (or template evaluating to "true"), all build outputs are placed in a flat `dist/` directory instead of `dist/{target}/`. |
| `nsis` | list of NsisConfig | ‚Äî | NSIS installer configurations for this crate. |
| `path` | string | ‚Äî | Relative path to the crate directory from the project root. |
| `pkgs` | list of PkgConfig | ‚Äî | macOS PKG installer configurations for this crate. |
| `publish` | PublishConfig | ‚Äî | Publishing targets (Homebrew, Scoop, AUR, etc.) for this crate. |
| `release` | ReleaseConfig | ‚Äî | GitHub release configuration for this crate. |
| `snapcrafts` | list of SnapcraftConfig | ‚Äî | Snapcraft package configurations for this crate. |
| `tag_template` | string | ‚Äî | Git tag template used to tag and identify releases (supports templates). |
| `universal_binaries` | list of UniversalBinaryConfig | ‚Äî | macOS universal binary (fat binary) configurations for this crate. |
| `version` | string | ‚Äî | Pinned semver version. When set, `anodizer bump --strict` refuses to edit this crate's `Cargo.toml` to anything other than this value; without `--strict`, the bump proceeds with a warning. Lets a release captain freeze a crate's version while still running broad `--workspace` bumps. |
| `version_sync` | VersionSyncConfig | ‚Äî | Automatic version number synchronization configuration for this crate. |

## `defaults`
Workspace-level defaults that path-mirror the `CrateConfig` (and select top-level `Config`) shape. Each field here is folded into every resolved crate by `defaults_merge::apply_defaults` according to the deep-merge / merge-by-identity semantics documented in `defaults_merge`.

Multi-publisher fields are single-struct on both sides today: defaults supplies one struct per publisher, and per-crate `publish.*` fields are also single-struct. A future change may introduce list-or-scalar via `OneOrMany<T>` on the per-crate side so a crate can declare multiple homebrew taps / scoop buckets / etc.; the defaults side would stay single-struct and merge into the first per-crate entry by identity.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `app_bundles` | AppBundleConfig | ‚Äî | Default app-bundle settings applied to all crates. |
| `archives` | ArchiveConfig | ‚Äî | Default archive settings applied to all crates. |
| `binary_signs` | SignConfig | ‚Äî | Default binary-signing settings. |
| `builds` | BuildConfig | ‚Äî | Default build settings applied to every crate's builds (deep-merged into each `CrateConfig.builds[]` entry by identity on `id`/`binary`). |
| `checksum` | ChecksumConfig | ‚Äî | Default checksum settings applied to all crates. Mirrors `CrateConfig.checksum` so checksum config can be hoisted to defaults. |
| `crates` | DefaultsCrateBlock | ‚Äî | Crate-axis defaults marker. Only valid when top-level `crates:` is set. Reserved for per-crate overrides keyed by crate id (future waves). |
| `cross` | CrossStrategy | ‚Äî | Default cross-compilation strategy: auto, zigbuild, cross, or cargo. Mirrors `CrateConfig.cross` so the strategy can be hoisted to defaults. |
| `dmgs` | DmgConfig | ‚Äî | Default DMG settings applied to all crates. |
| `docker_signs` | DockerSignConfig | ‚Äî | Default Docker image signing settings. |
| `docker_v2` | DockerV2Config | ‚Äî | Default Docker (V2 API) image settings applied to all crates. |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Default environment variables (`KEY=VALUE` strings) hoisted across crates. |
| `flatpaks` | FlatpakConfig | ‚Äî | Default flatpak settings applied to all crates. |
| `makeselves` | MakeselfConfig | ‚Äî | Default makeself settings applied to all crates. |
| `msis` | MsiConfig | ‚Äî | Default MSI settings applied to all crates. |
| `nfpms` | NfpmConfig | ‚Äî | Default nfpm (deb/rpm/apk) settings applied to all crates. |
| `notarize` | NotarizeConfig | ‚Äî | Default macOS notarization settings. |
| `nsis` | NsisConfig | ‚Äî | Default NSIS settings applied to all crates. |
| `pkgs` | PkgConfig | ‚Äî | Default macOS PKG settings applied to all crates. |
| `publish` | PublishDefaults | ‚Äî | Default publisher configurations (single-struct per publisher). Per-crate `publish.*` entries are merged into these by identity. |
| `sbom` | SbomConfig | ‚Äî | Default SBOM generation settings. |
| `sign` | SignConfig | ‚Äî | Default artifact signing settings. |
| `snapcrafts` | SnapcraftConfig | ‚Äî | Default snapcraft settings applied to all crates. |
| `source` | SourceConfig | ‚Äî | Default source-archive settings applied to all crates. |
| `srpms` | SrpmConfig | ‚Äî | Default SRPM settings applied to all crates. |
| `targets` | list of string | ‚Äî | Default build targets (e.g., ["x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu", "aarch64-apple-darwin"]). |
| `upx` | UpxConfig | ‚Äî | Default UPX compression settings applied to all crates. |
| `workspaces` | DefaultsWorkspaceBlock | ‚Äî | Workspace-axis defaults marker. Only valid when top-level `workspaces:` is set. Reserved for per-workspace overrides keyed by workspace name (future waves). |

## `docker_signs`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `args` | list of string | ‚Äî | Arguments passed to the signing command (supports templates). |
| `artifacts` | string | ‚Äî | Docker artifact types to sign: "all", "image", or "manifest" (default: "none"). |
| `certificate` | string | ‚Äî | Certificate file to embed in the signature (Cosign bundle signing). |
| `cmd` | string | ‚Äî | Signing command to invoke (default: "cosign"). |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables passed to the signing command. |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Unique identifier for this docker sign config. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Docker config IDs filter: only sign images from configs whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | ‚Äî | Template-conditional: skip this docker sign config if rendered result is "false" or empty. |
| `output` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Capture and log stdout/stderr of the docker signing command. |
| `signature` | string | ‚Äî | Signature output filename template (supports templates). |
| `stdin` | string | ‚Äî | Content written to the signing command's stdin. |
| `stdin_file` | string | ‚Äî | Path to a file whose content is written to the signing command's stdin. |

## `dockerhub`
DockerHub description sync configuration. Pushes image descriptions and README content to DockerHub repositories.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `description` | string | ‚Äî | Short description for the DockerHub repository (max 100 chars). |
| `full_description` | DockerHubFullDescription | ‚Äî | Full description (README) source for the DockerHub repository. |
| `images` | list of string | ‚Äî | DockerHub image names to update (e.g. `myorg/myapp`). |
| `secret_name` | string | ‚Äî | Environment variable name containing the DockerHub token. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip this publisher. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `username` | string | ‚Äî | DockerHub username for authentication. |

## `git`
Git-level tag discovery and sorting settings.

Controls how anodizer discovers and orders tags when determining the current and previous versions. This is separate from `TagConfig`, which controls version *bumping* logic.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `ignore_tag_prefixes` | list of string | ‚Äî | Tag prefixes to ignore during version detection (supports templates). Tags starting with any prefix in this list are excluded. Mirrors GoReleaser Pro's ignore_tag_prefixes feature. |
| `ignore_tags` | list of string | ‚Äî | Tag patterns to ignore during version detection (supports templates). Tags matching any pattern in this list are excluded from version detection entirely. |
| `prerelease_suffix` | string | ‚Äî | Suffix that identifies pre-release tags for sorting purposes. When set, tags ending with this suffix are treated as pre-releases and sorted accordingly during tag discovery. |
| `tag_sort` | string | ‚Äî | How to sort git tags when determining the latest version.

Accepted values: - `"-version:refname"` (default) ‚Äî lexicographic version sort on the tag name. - `"-version:creatordate"` ‚Äî sort by the tag's creation date (newest first). |

## `gitea_urls`
Custom Gitea API/download URLs for self-hosted Gitea installations. Matches GoReleaser's `GiteaURLs` struct.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `api` | string | ‚Äî | Gitea API base URL (e.g. `https://gitea.example.com/api/v1/`). |
| `download` | string | ‚Äî | Gitea download URL for release assets. |
| `skip_tls_verify` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, skip TLS certificate verification for the custom URLs. |

## `github_urls`
Custom GitHub API/upload/download URLs for GitHub Enterprise installations. Matches GoReleaser's `GitHubURLs` struct.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `api` | string | ‚Äî | GitHub API base URL (e.g. `https://github.example.com/api/v3/`). |
| `download` | string | ‚Äî | GitHub download URL for release assets (e.g. `https://github.example.com/`). |
| `skip_tls_verify` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, skip TLS certificate verification for the custom URLs. |
| `upload` | string | ‚Äî | GitHub upload URL for release assets (e.g. `https://github.example.com/api/uploads/`). |

## `gitlab_urls`
Custom GitLab API/download URLs for self-hosted GitLab installations. Matches GoReleaser's `GitLabURLs` struct.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `api` | string | ‚Äî | GitLab API base URL (e.g. `https://gitlab.example.com/api/v4/`). |
| `download` | string | ‚Äî | GitLab download URL for release assets. |
| `skip_tls_verify` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, skip TLS certificate verification for the custom URLs. |
| `use_job_token` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, use the CI_JOB_TOKEN for authentication instead of a personal token. |
| `use_package_registry` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, use the GitLab Package Registry for uploads instead of Generic Packages. |

## `homebrew_casks`
Unified Homebrew Cask configuration (WAVE 4).

Used at both call-sites: - `homebrew_casks:` ‚Äî top-level array (GoReleaser parity); carries `repository`, `commit_author`, `directory`, `ids`, `url`, structured `uninstall`/`zap`, etc. - `crates[].publish.homebrew_cask:` ‚Äî per-crate override; same shape, with `url_template` as the simpler URL alternative.

Fields from both original types are present; any field may be `None` at either call-site. The union avoids a two-type bifurcation while keeping both axes.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `alternative_names` | list of string | ‚Äî | Alternative cask names (aliases). |
| `app` | string | ‚Äî | macOS .app bundle name (e.g. "MyApp.app"). |
| `binaries` | list of string | ‚Äî | Binary stubs to create in /usr/local/bin (paths inside the .app bundle). |
| `caveats` | string | ‚Äî | Custom caveats shown after install. |
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | ‚Äî | Commit author with optional signing. |
| `commit_msg_template` | string | ‚Äî | Custom commit message template. Default: "Brew cask update for {{ .ProjectName }} version {{ .Tag }}" |
| `completions` | HomebrewCaskCompletions | ‚Äî | Shell completion definitions. |
| `conflicts` | list of HomebrewCaskConflictEntry | ‚Äî | Conflicting casks or formulae. |
| `custom_block` | string | ‚Äî | Arbitrary Ruby code inserted into the cask block. |
| `dependencies` | list of HomebrewCaskDependencyEntry | ‚Äî | Cask dependencies (other casks or formulae). |
| `description` | string | ‚Äî | Cask description. |
| `directory` | string | ‚Äî | Subdirectory in the tap repo for cask placement (default: "Casks"). |
| `generate_completions_from_executable` | HomebrewCaskGeneratedCompletions | ‚Äî | Auto-generate shell completions from an executable. |
| `homepage` | string | ‚Äî | Project homepage URL. |
| `hooks` | HomebrewCaskHooks | ‚Äî | Pre/post install/uninstall hooks. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `license` | string | ‚Äî | License identifier (SPDX). |
| `manpages` | list of string | ‚Äî | Manual page references to install. |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Cask name (default: crate / project name). |
| `repository` | RepositoryConfig | ‚Äî | Unified repository config for the Homebrew tap. |
| `service` | string | ‚Äî | Homebrew service definition. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip publishing the cask. `"true"` always skips; `"auto"` skips for prerelease versions. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `uninstall` | HomebrewCaskUninstall | ‚Äî | Structured uninstall stanza configuration. |
| `url` | HomebrewCaskURL | ‚Äî | Structured download URL configuration (top-level axis). |
| `url_template` | string | ‚Äî | Simple URL template for the .dmg/.zip download (per-crate shorthand).

Cannot be combined with `url.template:` ‚Äî set one or the other. If both are present, config validation rejects the config at parse time. Use `url:` for the structured form (verified domain, custom headers, etc.) or `url_template:` for a bare string shorthand ‚Äî never both simultaneously. |
| `zap` | HomebrewCaskUninstall | ‚Äî | Deep uninstall (zap) stanza configuration. |

## `makeselfs`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `compression` | string | ‚Äî | Compression algorithm: gzip, bzip2, xz, lzo, compress, or none. |
| `description` | string | ‚Äî | Description for LSM metadata. |
| `extra_args` | list of string | ‚Äî | Extra arguments passed to the makeself command. |
| `filename` | string | ‚Äî | Output filename template (default includes project, version, os, arch). |
| `files` | list of MakeselfFile | ‚Äî | Additional files to include in the archive. |
| `goarch` | list of string | ‚Äî | Target architecture filter. |
| `goos` | list of string | ‚Äî | Target OS filter (default: ["linux", "darwin"]). |
| `homepage` | string | ‚Äî | Homepage URL for LSM metadata. |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Unique identifier for this makeself config (default: "default"). |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only include artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `keywords` | list of string | ‚Äî | Keywords for LSM metadata. |
| `license` | string | ‚Äî | License for LSM metadata. |
| `maintainer` | string | ‚Äî | Maintainer for LSM metadata. |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Display name embedded in the self-extracting archive. |
| `script` | string | ‚Äî | Startup script to run when the archive is extracted and executed. Required ‚Äî the archive will not be created without this. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip this config. Accepts bool or template string. |

## `metadata`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `commit_author` | CommitAuthorConfig | ‚Äî | Commit author identity for Pro commit workflows (GoReleaser Pro v2.12+). Reuses the shared `CommitAuthorConfig` (name + email + optional signing). Exposed as `{{ .Metadata.CommitAuthor.Name }}` / `{{ .Metadata.CommitAuthor.Email }}`. |
| `description` | string | ‚Äî | Human-readable project description (exposed as `{{ .Metadata.Description }}`). |
| `full_description` | ContentSource | ‚Äî | Long-form project description (GoReleaser Pro v2.1+). Supports inline string, `from_file`, or `from_url`. Exposed as `{{ .Metadata.FullDescription }}`. FromUrl is resolved lazily (requires the release stage); FromFile is resolved at context-populate time with template-rendered path. |
| `homepage` | string | ‚Äî | Project homepage URL (exposed as `{{ .Metadata.Homepage }}`). |
| `license` | string | ‚Äî | Project license identifier, e.g. "MIT" or "Apache-2.0" (exposed as `{{ .Metadata.License }}`). |
| `maintainers` | list of string | ‚Äî | List of project maintainers (exposed as `{{ .Metadata.Maintainers }}`). |
| `mod_timestamp` | string | ‚Äî | Global modification timestamp for metadata output files (metadata.json and artifacts.json). Template string (e.g. "{{ .CommitTimestamp }}") or unix timestamp. When set, rendered late in the pipeline and applied as file mtime. Exposed as `{{ .Metadata.ModTimestamp }}`. |

## `milestones`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `close` | bool | ‚Äî | Close the milestone on release. Default: false. |
| `fail_on_error` | bool | ‚Äî | Fail the pipeline if milestone close fails. Default: false. |
| `name_template` | string | ‚Äî | Milestone name template (default: "{{ .Tag }}"). |
| `repo` | ScmRepoConfig | ‚Äî | Repository owner/name. Auto-detected from git remote if not set. |

## `monorepo`
GoReleaser Pro monorepo configuration.

When configured, tag discovery filters by `tag_prefix` and the working directory is scoped to `dir`.

This is DIFFERENT from `TagConfig.tag_prefix`: - `MonorepoConfig.tag_prefix`: tags in git already HAVE the prefix (e.g. `subproject1/v1.2.3`). The prefix is STRIPPED for `{{ .Tag }}` while `{{ .PrefixedTag }}` retains the full tag. - `TagConfig.tag_prefix`: a prefix to PREPEND when constructing `{{ .PrefixedTag }}` from a plain tag.

When `monorepo` is configured, it takes precedence over `tag.tag_prefix` for `PrefixedTag` / `PrefixedPreviousTag` behavior.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `dir` | string | ‚Äî | Working directory for this subproject.

Used for changelog path filtering (when no explicit `changelog.paths` or `crate.path` is configured) and as the default build `dir`. |
| `tag_prefix` | string | ‚Äî | Tag prefix for this subproject (e.g. `"subproject1/"`).

Tags matching this prefix are selected during tag discovery, and the prefix is stripped from `{{ .Tag }}` while `{{ .PrefixedTag }}` retains the full tag. |

## `nightly`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `name_template` | string | ‚Äî | Template for the release name. Default: "{{ .ProjectName }}-nightly" |
| `tag_name` | string | ‚Äî | Tag name used for the nightly release. Default: "nightly". |

## `notarize`
Top-level notarization configuration supporting both cross-platform (`rcodesign`) and native macOS (`codesign` + `xcrun notarytool`) modes.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `macos` | list of MacOSSignNotarizeConfig | ‚Äî | Cross-platform signing/notarization (rcodesign-based, works on any OS). |
| `macos_native` | list of MacOSNativeSignNotarizeConfig | ‚Äî | Native signing/notarization (codesign + xcrun, macOS only). |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip all notarization. Accepts bool or template string. |

## `partial`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `by` | string | ‚Äî | How to split builds: "goos" (by OS, default) or "target" (by full triple). "goos" groups all arch variants for the same OS into one split job. "target" gives each unique target triple its own split job. |

## `publishers`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `args` | list of string | ‚Äî | Arguments passed to the publish command (supports templates). |
| `artifact_types` | list of string | ‚Äî | Artifact type filter: only publish artifacts of these types (e.g., "archive", "binary"). |
| `checksum` | bool | ‚Äî | Include checksums in published artifacts. |
| `cmd` | string | ‚Äî | Command to invoke for publishing. |
| `dir` | string | ‚Äî | Working directory for the publisher command. |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables passed to the publish command. |
| `extra_files` | list of ExtraFileSpec | ‚Äî | Extra files to include in publishing (glob patterns with optional name override). |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only publish artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `meta` | bool | ‚Äî | Include metadata artifacts in published artifacts. |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Human-readable name for this publisher (used in logs). |
| `signature` | bool | ‚Äî | Include signatures in published artifacts. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Template-conditional skip: if rendered result is `"true"`, skip this publisher. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if .IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"`). |
| `templated_extra_files` | list of TemplatedExtraFile | ‚Äî | Extra files whose contents are rendered through the template engine before publishing. Unlike `extra_files` which copy as-is, template variables like `{{ .Tag }}` are expanded. GoReleaser Pro feature. |

## `release`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `discussion_category_name` | string | ‚Äî | GitHub Discussion category name for the release. |
| `draft` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, create the release as a draft (unpublished). |
| `extra_files` | list of ExtraFileSpec | ‚Äî | Extra files to upload to the release beyond build artifacts. |
| `footer` | ContentSource | ‚Äî | Text appended to the release body (inline string, from_file, or from_url). |
| `gitea` | ScmRepoConfig | ‚Äî | Gitea repository to release to (owner and name). |
| `github` | ScmRepoConfig | ‚Äî | GitHub repository to release to (owner and name). |
| `gitlab` | ScmRepoConfig | ‚Äî | GitLab repository to release to (owner and name). |
| `header` | ContentSource | ‚Äî | Text prepended to the release body (inline string, from_file, or from_url). |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Artifact IDs filter for uploads. |
| `include_meta` | bool | ‚Äî | Upload metadata.json and artifacts.json as release assets. |
| `make_latest` | object | ‚Äî | Mark release as latest: true, false, or "auto" (latest non-prerelease). |
| `mode` | string | ‚Äî | Release mode: "keep-existing", "append", "prepend", or "replace". |
| `name_template` | string | ‚Äî | Release title template (supports templates). |
| `prerelease` | object | ‚Äî | Mark release as pre-release: true, false, or "auto" (inferred from tag). |
| `replace_existing_artifacts` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, replace existing release artifacts with the same name. |
| `replace_existing_draft` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, replace an existing draft release instead of failing. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip the release stage. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional skip). GoReleaser supports template strings here since v1.15.0. |
| `skip_upload` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip uploading artifacts: true, false, or "auto" (skip for snapshots). Accepts bool or template string (GoReleaser uses string type). |
| `tag` | string | ‚Äî | Override the release tag (template string). When set, this tag is used as the `tag_name` in the GitHub release API instead of the crate's `tag_template`. Useful in monorepo setups to strip a tag prefix (e.g. `"{{ .Tag }}"` to publish `v1.0.0` instead of `myapp/v1.0.0`). This is a GoReleaser Pro feature provided for free by anodizer. |
| `target_commitish` | string | ‚Äî | Target branch or SHA for the release tag. |
| `templated_extra_files` | list of TemplatedExtraFile | ‚Äî | Extra files whose contents are rendered through the template engine before upload. Unlike `extra_files` which copy as-is, template variables like `{{ .Tag }}` are expanded. GoReleaser Pro feature. |
| `use_existing_draft` | bool | ‚Äî | Reuse an existing draft release instead of creating a new one. |

## `sboms`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `args` | list of string | ‚Äî | Command-line arguments (supports templates and $artifact, $document vars). |
| `artifacts` | string | ‚Äî | Which artifacts to catalog: "source", "archive", "binary", "package", "diskimage", "installer", "any" (default: "archive"). |
| `cmd` | string | ‚Äî | Command to run for SBOM generation (default: "syft"). |
| `documents` | list of string | ‚Äî | Output document path templates (supports templates). |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables to pass to the command, as `KEY=VALUE` strings. Order is preserved. Values are template-rendered before being set. |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Unique identifier for this SBOM config (default: "default"). |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Filter by artifact IDs (ignored if artifacts="source"). |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip this SBOM config. Accepts bool or template string. |

## `signs`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `args` | list of string | ‚Äî | Arguments passed to the signing command (supports templates with ${artifact} and ${signature}). |
| `artifacts` | string | ‚Äî | Artifact types to sign: "all", "archive", "binary", "checksum", "package", "sbom" (default: "none"). |
| `certificate` | string | ‚Äî | Certificate file to embed in the signature (Cosign bundle signing). |
| `cmd` | string | ‚Äî | Signing command to invoke (default: "cosign" or "gpg"). |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables passed to the signing command. |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Unique identifier for this sign config. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only sign artifacts from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `if` | string | ‚Äî | Template-conditional: skip this sign config if rendered result is "false" or empty. |
| `output` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Capture and log stdout/stderr of the signing command. Accepts bool or template string (e.g., "{{ .IsSnapshot }}"). |
| `signature` | string | ‚Äî | Signature output filename template (supports templates). |
| `stdin` | string | ‚Äî | Content written to the signing command's stdin. |
| `stdin_file` | string | ‚Äî | Path to a file whose content is written to the signing command's stdin. |

## `snapshot`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `version_template` | string | ‚Äî | Version string template for snapshot builds (e.g., "{{ .Commit }}-SNAPSHOT"). |

## `source`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `enabled` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, generate a source code archive for the release. |
| `files` | list of SourceFileEntry | `[]` | Extra files to include in the source archive. Accepts strings (glob patterns) or objects with src/dst/info. |
| `format` | string | ‚Äî | Archive format for the source tarball: tar.gz, tgz, tar, or zip (default: tar.gz). |
| `name_template` | string | ‚Äî | Filename template for the source archive (supports templates). |
| `prefix_template` | string | ‚Äî | Prefix prepended to all paths inside the archive (supports templates). Defaults to name_template value. Use this to set a different prefix than the archive name. |

## `srpms`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `bins` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs whose binaries are bundled into the source RPM. When set, only artifacts produced by builds with these IDs are packaged. Mirrors GR `NFPM.Builds`. |
| `build_host` | string | ‚Äî | Override the build host recorded in the RPM header. Useful for reproducible builds where the actual hostname leaks build-env detail. |
| `compression` | string | ‚Äî | Compression algorithm (gzip, xz, zstd, none). |
| `contents` | list of NfpmContent | ‚Äî | Additional contents to include in the source RPM. Shares the unified [`NfpmContent`] type with nFPM contents; SRPM-style `source:` / `destination:` / `type:` keys are accepted via serde aliases. |
| `description` | string | ‚Äî | Package description. |
| `docs` | list of string | ‚Äî | Documentation files to include. |
| `enabled` | bool | ‚Äî | Enable source RPM generation. Default: false. |
| `epoch` | string | ‚Äî | RPM epoch. |
| `file_name_template` | string | ‚Äî | Output filename template. |
| `group` | string | ‚Äî | RPM group. |
| `import_path` | string | ‚Äî | Project import path (Go-style; for Rust this is the canonical repository URL, e.g. `github.com/owner/repo`). Used in spec file generation for downstream tooling that expects a vcs-rooted path. |
| `license` | string | ‚Äî | License identifier. |
| `license_file_name` | string | ‚Äî | License file name to include. |
| `maintainer` | string | ‚Äî | Package maintainer. |
| `package_name` | string | ‚Äî | Package name (default: project_name). |
| `packager` | string | ‚Äî | RPM packager field. |
| `posttrans` | string | ‚Äî | `%posttrans` scriptlet ‚Äî executed *after* all packages in the transaction have been installed. Path to a script file. |
| `prefixes` | list of string | ‚Äî | Filesystem prefixes the package may install to (RPM `Prefix:` tag). Each entry becomes one `Prefix:` directive ‚Äî relocatable RPMs need at least one prefix declared. |
| `prerelease` | string | ‚Äî | Prerelease suffix appended to the version (e.g. `rc1`, `beta2`). Mirrors GR `NFPM.Prerelease`. |
| `pretrans` | string | ‚Äî | `%pretrans` scriptlet ‚Äî executed on the package transaction *before* any package in the transaction is installed. Path to a script file. |
| `section` | string | ‚Äî | RPM section. |
| `signature` | NfpmSignatureConfig | ‚Äî | RPM signature configuration. Shares the unified [`NfpmSignatureConfig`] type with nFPM. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip this config. Accepts bool or template string. |
| `spec_file` | string | ‚Äî | Path to the RPM spec file template. |
| `summary` | string | ‚Äî | Summary line. |
| `url` | string | ‚Äî | Homepage URL. |
| `vendor` | string | ‚Äî | Package vendor. |
| `version_metadata` | string | ‚Äî | Build metadata appended to the version (e.g. git commit hash). Mirrors GR `NFPM.VersionMetadata`. |

## `tag`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `branch_history` | string | ‚Äî | Branch history mode for determining the previous tag: "full" or "last". |
| `custom_tag` | string | ‚Äî | Custom version tag to use instead of auto-incrementing. |
| `default_bump` | string | ‚Äî | Default version bump type when no conventional commit token is found: "major", "minor", "patch", or "none". |
| `force_without_changes` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, create a new tag even if no commits have changed since the last tag. |
| `force_without_changes_pre` | bool | ‚Äî | Like force_without_changes but only for pre-release versions. |
| `git_api_tagging` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, use the GitHub/GitLab API for tagging instead of git CLI. |
| `initial_version` | string | ‚Äî | Version string to use when no previous tag exists (default: "0.1.0"). |
| `major_string_token` | string | ‚Äî | Conventional commit token triggering a major bump (default: "major"). |
| `minor_string_token` | string | ‚Äî | Conventional commit token triggering a minor bump (default: "minor" or "feat"). |
| `none_string_token` | string | ‚Äî | Conventional commit token suppressing a version bump entirely (default: "none"). |
| `patch_string_token` | string | ‚Äî | Conventional commit token triggering a patch bump (default: "patch" or "fix"). |
| `prerelease` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, apply a pre-release suffix to the generated version. |
| `prerelease_suffix` | string | ‚Äî | Suffix appended to pre-release versions (e.g., "beta"). |
| `release_branches` | list of string | ‚Äî | Branch name patterns (supports wildcards) that trigger releases (default: ["master", "main"]). |
| `tag_context` | string | ‚Äî | Source for determining the previous tag: "repo" (default) or "branch". |
| `tag_post_hooks` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî | Commands to run after `anodizer tag` successfully creates and pushes the tag. Env and template vars same as `tag_pre_hooks`. |
| `tag_pre_hooks` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî | Commands to run before `anodizer tag` creates the tag. Useful for updating lockfiles or committing sibling changes that must be part of the tagged commit. Env: `ANODIZER_CURRENT_TAG`, `ANODIZER_PREVIOUS_TAG` are set; template vars `{{ .Tag }}`, `{{ .PreviousTag }}`, `{{ .Version }}`, `{{ .PrefixedTag }}` are available. |
| `tag_prefix` | string | ‚Äî | Prefix prepended to version tags (e.g., "v" produces "v1.2.3"). |
| `verbose` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, print verbose tag calculation output. |

## `template_files`
Configuration for a template file that is rendered through the template engine and placed in the dist directory as a release artifact.

GoReleaser Pro feature: all rendered template files are uploaded to the release by default. Both `src` and `dst` paths support template rendering.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `dst` | string | ‚Äî | Destination filename, prefixed with the dist directory. Templates: allowed. |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Identifier for this template file entry (default: "default"). |
| `mode` | string | ‚Äî | File permissions in octal notation as a string, e.g. `"0755"` (default: `"0655"`). Parsed at runtime via `parse_octal_mode()` to avoid YAML interpreting as decimal. |
| `src` | string | ‚Äî | Source template file path. The file contents are rendered through the template engine. Templates: allowed (in path itself). |

## `uploads`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `checksum` | bool | ‚Äî | Include checksums in uploaded artifacts. |
| `checksum_header` | string | ‚Äî | Header name for the SHA256 checksum of the artifact. |
| `client_x509_cert` | string | ‚Äî | Path to PEM-encoded client X.509 certificate for mTLS. |
| `client_x509_key` | string | ‚Äî | Path to PEM-encoded client X.509 key for mTLS. |
| `custom_artifact_name` | bool | ‚Äî | When true, use the artifact name as-is (don't append to target URL). |
| `custom_headers` | map | ‚Äî | Custom HTTP headers (each value is template-expanded). |
| `extra_files` | list of ExtraFileSpec | ‚Äî | Extra files to include in uploading. |
| `extra_files_only` | bool | ‚Äî | Upload only extra files, skip normal artifacts. |
| `exts` | list of string | ‚Äî | File extension filter: only upload artifacts with these extensions. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only upload artifacts whose `id` is in this list. |
| `meta` | bool | ‚Äî | Include metadata artifacts in uploaded artifacts. |
| `method` | string | ‚Äî | HTTP method: PUT or POST (default: PUT). |
| `mode` | string | ‚Äî | Upload mode: "archive" (default) or "binary". |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Human-readable name for this upload config. |
| `password` | string | ‚Äî | Password for HTTP basic auth (env var template strongly recommended; in-config plaintext leaves the value in `dist/config.yaml` after dry-run). Resolution order: rendered `password` template ‚Üí env `UPLOAD_{NAME}_SECRET`. Mirrors GoReleaser's `Upload.Password` cascade (added in upstream v2.12). |
| `signature` | bool | ‚Äî | Include signatures in uploaded artifacts. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Skip condition template (if rendered to "true", skip this upload). |
| `target` | string | ‚Äî | Target URL template (supports template variables like {{ .ProjectName }}, {{ .Version }}). |
| `trusted_certificates` | string | ‚Äî | Path to PEM-encoded trusted CA certificates. |
| `username` | string | ‚Äî | Username for HTTP basic auth. Resolution order: rendered `username` template ‚Üí env `UPLOAD_{NAME}_USERNAME`. Set this to a literal value or a `{{ .Env.X }}` template. |

## `upx`
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `args` | list of string | `[]` | Extra arguments passed to UPX (e.g., ["-9", "--brute"]). |
| `binary` | string | `upx` | UPX executable path or name (default: "upx"). |
| `brute` | bool | ‚Äî | Use brute-force compression (--brute flag). Very slow but produces smallest output. |
| `compress` | string | ‚Äî | UPX compression level string (e.g., "1"-"9", "best"). Maps to `--compress` flag. |
| `enabled` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Whether to compress binaries with UPX. Accepts bool or template string (GoReleaser parity: `tmpl.Bool(upx.Enabled)`). |
| `id` | string | ‚Äî | Unique identifier for this UPX config. |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Build IDs filter: only compress binaries from builds whose `id` is in this list. |
| `lzma` | bool | ‚Äî | Use LZMA compression (--lzma flag). |
| `required` | bool | `false` | When true, fail the build if UPX is not found. |
| `targets` | list of string | ‚Äî | Target triples to compress binaries for (empty means all targets). |

## `workspaces`
A workspace represents an independent project root within a monorepo. Each workspace has its own crates, changelog, and release configuration, allowing independently-versioned components that aren't Cargo workspace members.
| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `after` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî | Hooks run after this workspace's pipeline completes. |
| `before` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî | Hooks run before this workspace's pipeline starts. |
| `binary_signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` | Binary-specific signing configs (same shape as `signs` but only for binary artifacts). The `artifacts` field on each entry is constrained at parse time to `binary` / `none` (or omitted) ‚Äî a broader filter on `binary_signs` would silently match nothing because the loop only iterates Binary artifacts. Constraint lives in `deserialize_binary_signs`. |
| `changelog` | ChangelogConfig | ‚Äî | Changelog configuration for this workspace. |
| `crates` | list of CrateConfig | `[]` | Crates belonging to this workspace. |
| `env` | list of string | ‚Äî | Environment variables scoped to this workspace.

List of `KEY=VALUE` strings (GoReleaser parity). Order is preserved. Values are template-rendered at pipeline startup. |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî | Workspace identifier used in logs and template variables. |
| `signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` | Signing configurations for binaries, archives, and checksums. |
| `skip` | list of string | `[]` | Pipeline stages to skip when releasing this workspace. Stage names match the CLI `--skip` flag (e.g., `announce`, `publish`). |
